query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.loginMethod, t.companyName AS tenant, t.slug
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id
ORDER BY u.role, u.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2JxPWVMXcgLmzJd.root --database Ve29H94aZcWFrpYwT4447v --execute
